datasetName: Dataset for manuscript titled: Female mice exhibit resistance to disease progression despite early pathology in a transgenic mouse model inoculated with alpha-synuclein fibrils
datasetDescription: This repository contains the source data and code for the analyses in the manuscript titled "Female mice exhibit resistance to disease progression despite early pathology in a transgenic mouse model inoculated with alpha-synuclein fibrils", accepted for publication at Communications Biology.
datasetType: source data (demographics (csv) MRI statistical maps and group average (MINC), behavioural data (csv)) and code

datasetType: source data (demographics (csv) MRI statistical maps and group average (MINC), behavioural data (csv)) and code

datasetName: Dataset for manuscript titled: Experimental Quality Control Induces Changes in Allen Mouse Brain Connectomes
datasetDescription: This repository contains the original and rebuilt regionalized voxel model (RVM) and homogeneous model (HM) connectomes from "Experimental Quality Control Induces  Changes in Allen Mouse Brain Connectomes" (Nathan et al., 2026; bioRxiv), as well as a conversion table of Allen region numbers to region names ( allen_ccfv3_tree_wang_2020_s2.xlsx) to interpret these results (taken from Supplementary Data in Wang et al., 2020). For code to reproduce all analyses from Nathan et al., 2026 using these connectomes, see https://github.com/vik16nathan/allen_connectome_qc/).
datasetType: regionalized connectome .csv files for two different representations of the mouse brain connectome, before and after excluding "failed" experiments from a rigorous QC procedure

datasetName: Supplementary Data for "Experimental Quality Control Induces Changes in Allen Mouse Brain Connectomes"
datasetDescription: Contains Supplementary Data 1 and 2 for "Experimental Quality Control Induces Changes in Allen Mouse Brain Connectomes"
datasetType: QC images (supplementary data 1) and ratings (supplementary data 2)

datasetDescription: GitHub repository to reproduce all results in Nathan et al., 2026.
datasetType: code to rerun all analyses and reproduce all plots

datasetDescription: Supplementary resources for the Menon Lab non-invasive awake mouse fMRI approach.
datasetType: raw data for all non-invasive and headpost scans. Code to produce figures. CAD models of the headpost and non-invasive restraints.
